faqs.question: How much does hornet removal cost in Port Washington?
faqs.answer: Hornet removal services in Port Washington typically range from $350 to $550, depending on nest size, location, and accessibility. We provide upfront pricing with no hidden fees and offer free inspections to Port Washington residents.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a hornet nest in Port Washington?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and emergency hornet removal services throughout Port Washington. Most hornet nest removals are completed within 1-2 hours, and we prioritize urgent situations where nests pose immediate threats to families or businesses.

faqs.question: Are hornets common in Port Washington during summer?
faqs.answer: Yes, Port Washington's waterfront location and abundance of trees make it attractive to hornets, especially from late spring through early fall. Bald-faced hornets and European hornets are particularly common near wooded areas and waterfront properties along Manhasset Bay.

faqs.question: Do you guarantee your hornet removal service in Port Washington?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We provide a comprehensive guarantee on all hornet removal services in Port Washington. If hornets return to the same location within our warranty period, we'll re-treat at no additional charge to ensure your property remains hornet-free.
